Thought 4: Max has a stronger case against him: he was the last person seen with Dwayne (in the car where the body was found), he owns a sickle (the murder weapon), and he has a clear motive (Dwayne threatened to expose a fake artifact and ruin his reputation). Anthony had access to the car and a motive (offense over criticism), but no direct link to the sickle or being at the scene that night. The gold paint is likely unrelated. Therefore, Max is the more likely murderer.
